title: [Vic's Point Blank] Ballistic Knife
description: An addon pack for Vic's Point Blank that adds the ballistic knife from Call of Duty: Black Ops II
body:
![A showcase of the Ballistic Knife](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c21349e7a1f44103b5e539e57e10beac95ed403.png)
An addon pack for Vic's Point Blank that adds a ballistic knife from Call of Duty: Black Ops II.

This pack was commissioned by "Scopes" on Discord. (Thank you!)
